finding: The focused `node --strip-types scripts/validate-governance-commands.ts` lane exceeded a 124-second interactive command timeout without progress output while validating TASK-AAO-0157.
expectedBehavior: Focused governance validation should expose phase progress, support safe resume or focused case selection, and complete within an interactive budget where feasible.
evidenceOrRepro: TASK-AAO-0158 switched the validator's ATM command calls to in-process `runCli`, added stable phase progress and SIGINT cancellation diagnostics, and measured `node --strip-types scripts/validate-governance-commands.ts --mode validate` at 26.9s on the Windows development host.
followUp: Keep `validate:governance-commands` as the default under-30s lane and `validate:governance-commands:full` as the named full integration lane while future fixture splits can add true parallel groups.
